children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In addition to funds available under section 104(c) of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 () for such purpose or under any other provision of that Act [ et seq.], there are authorized to be appropriated to the President, from amounts authorized to be appropriated under , a total of $4,000,000,000 for the 5-year period beginning on . to carry out section 104B of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961, as added by subsection (a) [].22 U.S.C. 2151b(c)22 U.S.C. 2151section 7671 of this title122 U.S.C. 2151b–3October 1, 2008So in original. The period probably should not appear.1

children.heading: Availability of funds
children.label: 2 Availability of funds
children.text: Amounts appropriated pursuant to the authorization of appropriations under paragraph (1) are authorized to remain available until expended.

children.heading: Transfer of prior year funds
children.label: 3 Transfer of prior year funds
children.text: Unobligated balances of funds made available for fiscal year 2001, 2002, or 2003 under section 104(c)(7) of the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961 ( (as in effect immediately before ) shall be transferred to, merged with, and made available for the same purposes as funds made available for fiscal years 2009 through 2013. under paragraph (1).22 U.S.C. 2151b(c)(7)May 27, 20031
